{{CargoClone
|name=Saintess of Sunlight
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=188
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +2.5%
|}}
